name: Dak's Sherry-Poppy Seed Wheat Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the yeast into the bread machine.
2. Add the whole wheat flour, canola oil, creamed sherry (or water), warmed sour cream, eggs, and 1/4 cup of warm water in the order listed.
3. Select "whole wheat" setting and push "start."
